# Databricks

> AI Registry entry [AIR-59](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-59/databricks) — status **Backlog** as of 2026-04-01. Departments: —.

**Category:** Data & AI Platform / Data Lakehouse
**Status:** Backlog
**Cost:** Consumption-based (per Databricks Compute Unit); Standard/Pro/Business tiers
**Departments:** TBC

## Overview

Unified data and AI platform on lakehouse architecture. Combines data warehousing reliability (ACID, governance) with data lake flexibility. Built on open-source (Apache Spark, Delta Lake). Single workspace for data engineering, analytics, data science, ML model lifecycle, generative AI.

## Key Capabilities

* Lakehouse architecture with Delta Lake (ACID-compliant data lake)
* SQL warehouses + notebooks (Python, SQL, Scala, R)
* MLflow integration — experiment tracking, model registry, serving
* Spark-powered distributed compute
* Real-time streaming and ETL pipelines
* Vector search and AI functions for RAG
* Multi-cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP)
* BI integrations: Tableau, Power BI, Looker

## Why Evaluating

Potential foundational infrastructure — unified platform consolidating data engineering, analytics, AI/ML under one roof. Open-source foundations reduce vendor lock-in. Lakehouse avoids separate warehouse + data lake cost. ML-native capabilities relevant as AI initiatives scale.

## Key Evaluation Areas

* TCO at Janus data volumes
* Integration fit with existing systems
* Data governance and compliance (§5.2.3)
* Whether complexity is justified vs lighter alternatives

*Backlog. Pending Stage 1 — Intake & Triage.*
